title: pachypleuria pusilla
intro: Pachypleuria pusilla, also known as the small maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to Japan, Korea, and parts of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pachypleuria pusilla are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and can also be made into a powder or tincture for use in supplements and traditional remedies.
